title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0995
summary: Lakshmi @ Jassi, along with co-accused, allegedly lured an Amritdhari Sikh man by pretending to offer financial investment services. The complainant was taken to a house, forced to disrobe, filmed, and blackmailed with the threat of public defamation unless he paid Rs.10 lakhs.
